Light gray on white — this should get fixed (fails AA ~1.3:1).

Normal body text with a low-contrast link embedded in it — this link should get fixed.

Semi-transparent text rgba(0,0,0,0.2) on white — effective contrast too low.

Dark body section: dim blue (#334466) on near-black background — should be fixed to readable light color.

Black on white — already passes AA (21:1). Must NOT be touched.

Background-image present — should be SKIPPED (state: skipped-bgimage).

White text on dark background — should NOT be touched.
